title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 26 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 26 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 26 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/10/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to rise in a day, main contract closed 714.5. a increase of 3.03% throughout the day. The spot quotation in themorning almost kept steady.
